programmes.show_description: Shadow Man. Emma is harassed by spirits. One sinister spirit is Shadow Man, and he won't give her up without a fight, so Ian takes extreme measures to save her. S6, Ep2
Footprints Of The Past. In Essex, a mysterious little footprint appears in wet paint whilst redecorating and the team capture a photograph of a young girl. Why is she there? S6, Ep3
Teleshopping.
Shop Local. Drew seeks out antiques that are rich with local provenance. On the Scottish border, he finds a Georgian Cockpen chair, then snaps up a chilling art piece in North Wales. S18, Ep4
Masters Of The Trade. On a trip from Manchester to Hampshire, Drew visits expert dealers, snapping up a campaign chair, a Georgian bookcase, and a 19th-century carved deer. S18, Ep5
A couple dream of owning a home in Florida. With their big budget, they hope to find a beautiful property that is contemporary and by the sea. S1, Ep8

A couple hope to find a three-bedroom home in Cheshire. Jules Hudson shows them around some stunning properties, including a unique barn conversion. S16, Ep69
In The Family. Drew seeks out a combination of knowledge and experience when he visits four family businesses. He discovers an exciting array of items to sell on. S18, Ep6
Georgian Special. Drew indulges his Georgian obsession in Lincoln, where he falls for a Regency wine cooler. And a bungalow near Stockport hides a vast collection. S18, Ep7
Survivors. Drew finds rare pieces that have stood the test of time. They include an 18th century cabinet in superb original condition and a chest from the Vatican. S18, Ep8
For the penultimate leg of their trip, Catherine Southon and Serhat Ahmet visit Norfolk and Northamptonshire. Who will make the biggest profit at auction? S23, Ep19
In the final lap of their race, there's a chance for Serhat Ahmet and Catherine Southon to spend big in East England. But who will take the chequered flag? S23, Ep20
Cobbler Dean restores a battered pair of football boots. Silversmith Brenton revives a trophy. Ceramics expert Kirsten works on a special globe. S7, Ep8
Barber's Collection Makes The Cut. Angus uncovers a rare coin collection and some vintage hair cutting gear. An old sea chest proves to be a treasure trove at auction. S3, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programmes.show_description: Davina and Nicky revisit more memorable searches, catching up with three families whose lives have been transformed in ways they never imagined. S3, Ep1

A Little Lady Makes Big Money. Angus finds a rare porcelain figure who's worth big bucks. A widow gets a surprise when her late husband's collection sells for a small fortune. S4, Ep1
Ancient Antiquities And Top Tackle. Angus unearths some ancient Greek and Roman artefacts in Derbyshire. In Kent, Angus is attracted to a curiously well-travelled wardrobe. S4, Ep2
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep25
New Block, New Drama. Four teams of design superstars create gorgeous kitchens and living rooms as the ultimate home renovation competition kicks off. S6, Ep1
House On The Hill. The team head to an isolated farmhouse to help a couple who are being tormented by terrifying paranormal activity including being attacked in bed. S6, Ep4
The Winsford Soul Tapper. Sadie has completely changed since she visited a dark witch. The team discovers a disturbing practice called Soul Tapping could be to blame. S6, Ep5
Pit Of Despair. Dave and Linda's home in County Durham is being plagued by a Poltergeist. The team finds a distraught spirit that is causing havoc to get attention. S6, Ep6

At a Catholic church in Liverpool, Drew's prayers are answered with a pair of very rare chairs. In Loughborough, he finds industrial gems in the world's largest bell foundry. S10, Ep12
Drew haggles hard at a museum of vintage farm equipment in Exmouth. Plus, he's bowled over by an amazing collection of arts and crafts furniture - but can he strike a deal? S10, Ep13
Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen & Crissy Rock. Comedian and actor Crissy gets a surprise at auction. Angus has a laugh at Laurence's mansion, where he finds a big porcelain pumpkin. S3, Ep2

Angus finds unique Coronation Street memorabilia in Amanda Barrie's Georgian home. Plus, he helps a former Blue Peter presenter at his farm in Wales. S3, Ep4
£1500 Each North. Natasha and Ishy point their classic car to Northumberland in search of profit-making collectables. Candelabra and militaria go under the gavel. S27, Ep16
